response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, including TypeScript and cloud infrastructure, with recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, his experience lacks direct evidence of building production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures. His background in AI-agent tools is promising but not fully aligned with the GenAI/enterprise cloud delivery focus.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack engineering experience, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of requests)
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in the resume
Limited evidence of leading AI-driven solutions or customer-facing technical leadership at scale
Most AI-related work appears to be on tooling (e.g., MCP generators) rather than production-grade GenAI systems
